requirements.text: Provide a North American mains inlet feeding fuse, switch, protective earth bond, and transformer primary wiring.
Expose only the isolated transformer secondary interface to the low-voltage amplifier board.
Represent creepage and clearance constraints for mains primary to isolated secondary separation.
Require qualified safety review before build, use, fabrication submission, or order submission.

assumptions.text: Enclosure, strain relief, fusing value, transformer certification, and regulatory requirements require qualified review.
assumptions.rationale: Mains-powered products are high-stakes and cannot be certified by Merlin.

unresolved_decisions.question: Qualified engineer must select certified transformer, fuse value, inlet, switch, enclosure, grounding, wiring, creepage, clearance, and regulatory path.

notes: The power-supply board includes mains inlet, fuse, switch, protective earth, and transformer primary hazards.
Merlin may prepare CAD artifacts but does not certify the board safe to build or use.
Qualified safety review is required for grounding, thermal, enclosure, creepage, clearance, fusing, and regulatory compliance.
